items.definition_en: Altocumulus is a type of white or gray cloud in the middle level of the sky.
items.example_en: Altocumulus clouds were scattered across the afternoon sky.

items.definition_en: A cirrus is a thin, wispy cloud found high in the sky.
items.example_en: Cirrus clouds look like long feathers above us.

items.definition_en: Stratus is a low, gray cloud that often covers the whole sky.
items.example_en: Stratus clouds made the morning very gloomy.

items.definition_en: A cumulus is a fluffy, white cloud with a flat bottom.
items.example_en: The children watched the cumulus clouds on a sunny day.

items.definition_en: Nimbus is a dark cloud that often brings rain.
items.example_en: A nimbus cloud passed and we needed umbrellas.

items.definition_en: A fog bank is a thick area of fog.
items.example_en: A fog bank rolled over the road in the morning.

items.definition_en: Cloud base is the lowest part of a cloud.
items.example_en: The hills disappeared below the cloud base.

items.definition_en: A cloud layer is a sheet of clouds in the sky.
items.example_en: The sun set behind a thick cloud layer.

items.definition_en: A clearing is a break in the clouds showing the sky.
items.example_en: There was a clearing after the rain stopped.

items.definition_en: Overcast is a sky covered with clouds.
items.example_en: The weather was overcast all day.

items.definition_en: Stratocumulus is a low, lumpy cloud often covering the sky.
items.example_en: Stratocumulus clouds made the morning look dull.

items.definition_en: Altostratus is a gray or blue middle cloud covering the sky.
items.example_en: Altostratus clouds covered the sun completely.

items.definition_en: Cirrostratus is a high, thin, white cloud covering the sky.
items.example_en: A soft halo appeared around the sun because of cirrostratus clouds.

items.definition_en: A wall cloud is a low cloud under a thunderstorm.
items.example_en: We saw a wall cloud before the heavy rain began.

items.definition_en: Cloud top is the highest part of a cloud.
items.example_en: The plane flew above the cloud top.

items.definition_en: A cloud bank is a mass of clouds, often low in the sky.
items.example_en: A thick cloud bank hid the mountains for hours.

items.definition_en: A cloud shadow is a shadow made by a cloud.
items.example_en: We sat under a cloud shadow to cool down.

items.definition_en: A towering cloud is a very tall cloud in the sky.
items.example_en: A towering cloud appeared before the storm.

items.definition_en: A mackerel sky is a sky with small, patchy clouds.
items.example_en: People noticed a mackerel sky in the afternoon.

items.definition_en: A cloud street is a long row of clouds in the sky.
items.example_en: A cloud street stretched over the field.
